revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_OED%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{For|the template to cite the ''[[:en:Online Etymology Dictionary|Online Etymology Dictionary]]''|Template:Cite OEtymD}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{cs1 wrapper|base=cite encyclopedia}} This template generates a citation for a particular term defined in the third edition of the ''[[:en:Oxford English Dictionary|Oxford English Dictionary]]''. == Usage == {{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|headword|entry ID}} To retrieve the entry ID, click "Cite" on the entry page and copy the 10-digit number after https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/. If the ID is absent, the headword is linked to the search results. The first and second parameters have aliases {{para|term}} and {{para|id}}, respectively. {{Automarkup |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}{{!}}A{{!}}7382069290}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}{{!}}term=A{{!}}id=7382069290}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}{{!}}term}} }} Some entries, such as those that have been chosen as "the word of the day", are fully accessible to everyone. You may note this and suppress the indication of required subscription by setting {{para|access|free}}. {{Automarkup |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}{{!}}ADA{{!}}6984906085{{!}}access=free}} }} For backwards compatibility, if the given ID is nine digits or less, the link uses the URL scheme that was used before the July 2023 overhaul of the ''OED'' site; existing links continue to work and do not need updating. {{Automarkup |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}{{!}}A{{!}}1}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}{{!}}ADA{{!}}104006160}} }} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "mode": { "label": "Mode", "description": "Citation style", "example": "CS2", "type": "string", "default": "CS1" }, "term": { "aliases": [ "1" ], "label": "Headword", "description": "Headword in the OED", "type": "string", "required": true, "example": "Acronym" }, "id": { "label": "Entry ID", "description": "ID after \"https://doi.org/10.1093/OED/\" (click \"Cite\" on the OED site to see)", "example": "7382069290", "type": "number", "aliases": [ "2" ], "suggested": true }, "short": { "label": "Short", "description": "Suppresses the display of the publisher, default date, and subscription notice", "example": "yes", "type": "string" }, "date": { "label": "Date", "description": "Date of entry", "example": "October 2016", "type": "date" }, "access-date": { "aliases": [ "accessdate" ], "label": "Access date", "description": "Date the OED was verified as supporting the content it is cited for", "example": "10 September 2016", "type": "date", "suggested": true }, "ref": { "label": "ref", "description": "Anchor ID", "example": "OEDacronym", "default": "{{harvid|Reference-OED-{{{term|{{{1|}}}}}}", "type": "string" }, "access": { "label": "Access", "description": "\"free\" if the entry is free to read for anyone", "example": "free", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Citation template for the third edition of the Oxford English Dictionary", "paramOrder": [ "term", "id", "access-date", "ref", "short", "mode", "date", "access" ], "format": "inline" } == See also == * {{Tl|Cite OED1}}, which generates citation code for the first (print) edition * {{Tl|Cite OED2}}, which generates citation code for the second (print) edition {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Dictionary source templates]] [[Category:Citation templates that wrap CS1 templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
